cbdc_intro_1: Umhlaba wethu uya ngokuya uba yidijithali, kanjalo nemali yethu.
cbdc_intro_2: Lokho kuphakamisa umbuzo: sifuna imali yethu yedijithali ibukeke kanjani?
cbdc_intro_3: Amazwe amaningi ahlola ukukhipha i-Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC) okuyinhlobo yedijithali ngokuphelele yemali yethu ekhona kahulumeni.
cbdc_intro_4: Ake sibheke umehluko phakathi kwezinhlobo ezimbili zemali yedijithali: I-Bitcoin & Ama-Central Bank Digital Currency (Ama-CBDC).
point_1_summary_1: I-Bitcoin yenzelwe ukukunika ukulawula okuphelele emalini yakho.
point_1_summary_3: Ama-CBDC enzelwe ukunika ohulumeni namabhange omkhulu ukulawula okuphelele emalini yakho.
point_2_summary_1: I-Bitcoin ayiphelelwa yisikhathi futhi ayinazimali zenyanga.
point_2_summary_3: Lapho ama-CBDC ephelelwa yisikhathi, akuvimbela ukongiwa kwekusasa.
point_3_summary_1: I-Bitcoin inomkhawulo oqinile wezinhlamvu ezingu-21 million BTC ezizokhona.
point_3_summary_2: Ama-CBDC, njengomali kahulumeni esiyisebenzisayo namuhla, awanakho ukuqedwa kwenani eliphelele. Lokho kungabikho komkhawulo kwenani eliphelele kuvumela uhulumeni ukukhulisa inani lemali.
point_4_summary_1: Amakheli e-Bitcoin a-pseudonymous, okusho ukuthi awaxhumene negama lakho langempela noma ubuwena. Ama-CBDC axhumene ngqo negama lakho langempela nobuwena okuvumela ukuqaphwa kwezimali okukhulu nokuvinjelwa.
point_5_summary_2: Amashumi ezinkulungwane ama-node azimele aqinisekisa imithetho yenethiwekhi.
point_5_summary_3: Ama-CBDC acentralized ezandleni zikahulumeni namabhange omkhulu, okuwanika ukulawula okuphelele kunethiwekhi ye-CBDC.
point_6_summary_1: I-Bitcoin ivumela noma ubani ukusebenzisa i-node eqinisekisa ukuthi imithetho yenethiwekhi iyalandelwa. Ama-CBDC awavumeli muntu ukusebenzisa ama-node futhi ancike ekuthembeni uhulumeni namabhange omkhulu.
point_7_summary_1: I-Bitcoin yenzelwe ukwenza kungabi nako ukuthi abanye bavale imali yakho. Ama-CBDC enzelwe ukwenza kube lula kohulumeni namabhange omkhulu ukuvala imali yakho.
point_8_summary_1: I-Bitcoin yenzelwe ukukunika ukulawula okuphelele emalini yakho.
point_8_summary_2: Qiniseka nje ukuthi uyikhipha uyise esikhwameni sokuzigcinela.
point_8_summary_3: Lapho uzigcinela i-bitcoin yakho, akekho ongakuvimba ukufinyelela emalini yakho.
point_8_summary_4: Ama-CBDC adinga ukuba uthembe abagcini, njengelebhange noma uhulumeni, ukugcina imali yakho.
point_9_summary_1: I-Bitcoin inenqubomgomo yemali elindelekile emisiwe ekhodini futhi engeke yashintshwa. Ama-CBDC, njengomali yethu yanamuhla, anenqubomgomo yemali engashintshwa kalula.
point_9_summary_2: Lokhu kuholela kunfleshini lapho osopolitiki bephrinta imali eningi kakhulu.
point_10_summary_1: I-Bitcoin iyinethiwekhi yekhompyutha ephephile kunazo zonke eyake yaba khona futhi ayikaze ihlaselwe. Ama-CBDC ancike kohulumeni namabhange ukuvikela inethiwekhi, abahlaselwe izikhathi ezingenakubalwa emlandweni.
